since_last: 61% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.87%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 61% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.28% · BTC -0.59% · Gold -0.21% · Nasdaq100 +0.83%. 61% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.87%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.87%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.25%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at +6.34%
cards.body: Leaders: TER +6.34%, AMBA +5.45%, MRVL +5.10%, INTC +4.30%, AMD +3.99%. Laggards: NOW -4.00%, ADBE -3.93%, ORCL -3.92%, INTU -3.01%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.98% at $121.54
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.98% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
